commit.message:
fix: persist Nextcloud identity across emptyDir restarts on canary-prod

instanceid/passwordsalt/secret regenerating on every pod start breaks
sessions and encryption. Store them in nextcloud-secrets and inject via
env vars + identity.config.php ConfigMap so they're stable across restarts.

Also sets installed=true and trusted_domains/overwrite.cli.url via config
so the entrypoint never hits the "DB not empty" install failure again.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: correct http status attribute references in MCP logs search (#1814) ## Summary Fixes incorrect attribute path references in the MCP logs search filter bar and client-side trace grouping: - **Placeholder text** used `http.status` but the actual OTel attribute is `http.response.status_code` — users would type the placeholder example, get no autocomplete match, and think the feature was broken - **Client-side status extraction** used `http.status_code` instead of `http.response.status_code`, so the `StatusBadge` in trace rows likely never rendered HTTP status codes in the attribute-filtered view ## Test plan - [x] Open MCP logs page, verify placeholder now shows `http.response.status_code != 200` - [x] Type `http.response` in filter bar — autocomplete should show `http.response.status_code` - [x] Apply a `http.response.status_code != 200` filter — verify results filter correctly - [x] Check that trace rows display HTTP status badges when status code data is present Closes AGE-1521 🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code) --- --------- Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6

Phase 3: Add clip generation pipeline with highlight detection

New: highlights.js — scoring engine (audio energy 40%, transcript
sentiment 30%, game keywords 20%, pacing 10%). Detects ~30 highlight
segments per 30-min recording, groups into 15-60s clips.

Pipeline handler (pipeline:generateClips) orchestrates: probe source →
create project → extract audio → Whisper transcribe → analyze loudness →
detect highlights → cut clips → thumbnails → save project JSON.

RecordingsView: wired Generate Clips button with real pipeline calls,
progress overlay showing stage/percentage, disabled state during generation.
App.js: loads projects from disk via projectList(), refreshes on generation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ADR-0018 Phase 1-2: 16GB swap, capacity gate, adaptive idle watchdog

Phase 1:
- 16GB swapfile on btrfs @swap subvolume (both nodes, already active)
- Capacity gate: refuse new VMs at 50 concurrent or <1GB available RAM
- Return 503 with Retry-After: 30 header on capacity errors

Phase 2:
- Adaptive idle watchdog reads /proc/meminfo every 30s
- Memory pressure tiers: >60% normal (30min), 30-60% warning (5min),
  15-30% high (30s), <15% critical (force-hibernate least-active)
- At critical pressure, hibernate up to 5 VMs per cycle

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix bullet truncation: disable thinking tokens for STI statement generation

Gemini 2.5 Flash uses thinking by default; without thinking_budget=0 the
thinking pass consumed most of the 4096-token budget, leaving <100 tokens
for the actual bullet text and causing mid-sentence cut-offs.

A single resume bullet needs no chain-of-thought — thinking_budget=0
disables it entirely and 1024 output tokens is ample for 1-2 sentences.

commit.message:
feat!: replace notification-based sending with flag-based polling (#11)

Replace xTaskNotifyGive/ulTaskNotifyTake with volatile bool flags
(s_report, s_busy) for simpler, race-free report scheduling. The task
loop now polls flags directly instead of draining notifications.

- SOF callback sets s_report; report_complete_cb clears s_busy
- send_report is now fire-and-forget (copies data, returns ESP_OK)
- Add s_report_size == 0 guard to avoid sending before first report
- Remove hat_cache from report_buf (simplify hat lookup to linear scan)
- Remove unused esp_tinyusb Kconfig options from example sdkconfig
- Reduce tud_task_ext timeout from 2ms to 1ms

BREAKING CHANGE: hid_gamepad_report_buf_t no longer contains hat_cache
field. send_report no longer returns send errors — it stages data for
the next SOF-paced send.

commit.message:
perf: 4 项高价值改进 — 标的并行化、预算原子检查、进程锁、DB 备份

1. 标的并行化 (alpha_hive_daily_report.py)
   - 将串行 for ticker 循环改为 ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=4) 并行
   - 用 Lock 保护 checkpoint 写入防止并发冲突
   - 9 标的预估从 ~8 分钟降至 ~2 分钟

2. LLM 预算原子检查 (llm_service.py)
   - 调用前用 max_tokens*output_pricing 估算本次费用
   - 在 _lock 内原子比较 current_cost + estimated >= budget
   - 杜绝预算溢出风险

3. 进程锁 (orchestrator.sh)
   - 用 mkdir 原子操作 + PID 文件实现跨平台互斥锁
   - 支持僵尸锁检测（旧进程已死时自动清理）
   - trap EXIT 确保退出时释放锁

4. DB 自动备份 (orchestrator.sh)
   - 每日扫描前 cp pheromone.db → db_backups/
   - 自动清理 7 天前的旧备份
   - .gitignore 加入 db_backups/

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix GPS tracking on Capacitor: dual-layer position source + relaxed filters

Root cause: native BackgroundGeolocation callback was the ONLY position
source in Capacitor mode. If the native locationProcessor filter rejected
all fixes (accuracy >50m, stationary jitter) or the plugin failed silently,
latestPosition stayed null and sendPosition() skipped every interval forever.
Only clock-in/out pings (from TimeclockFunctions with hardcoded NULL accuracy)
reached the server — explaining 1-2 pings/day with null accuracy.

Fixes:
- startTracking() now falls through to browser watchPosition even in native
  mode, providing a reliable secondary position source
- sendPosition() has a one-shot getCurrentPosition fallback after 60s of
  no GPS fix from either native or watch
- locationProcessor accuracy threshold raised from 50m to 200m (indoors,
  urban canyon)
- First 3 native fixes always accepted (skip accuracy gate on cold start)
- Stationary jitter filter relaxed from every-10th to every-3rd point
- Cache-bust versions updated to force device refresh

commit.message:
ADR-0018: Drop virtiofs, enable KSM, adaptive capacity management

Replace virtiofs with shared read-only squashfs virtio-blk for nix-store,
enabling shared=off + KSM (3x VM capacity: 58→170+). Add adaptive idle
watchdog (memory-pressure-aware), capacity gate (503 at limit), 16GB swap.

feat: replace generic shield icon with Oathbound logo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v3: fix depleted reading, EMA smoothing, boot calibration screen

Root causes diagnosed from ESP32-C6 BSP bug reports:

1. Remove analogReadResolution(12) — documented bug on ESP32-C6 causes
   analogReadMilliVolts() to return half the true value when called after
   analogReadResolution(); 12-bit is the hardware default so the call is
   both redundant and harmful (gh issues #8999, #11041, #11324).

2. Change V_DIVIDER default to 2.0 — Expansion Board v1.1 uses a
   200kΩ:200kΩ (1:1) divider, giving VBAT/2 on A0. Previous code used 4.0
   which happened to partially cancel the halved ADC readings (two wrongs
   making a right). Boot calibration screen now lets the user verify.

3. Replace 8-sample average with EMA (α=0.05, τ≈3.8s) + 32-sample
   per-read average — eliminates the visible bar jumping.

4. Add 3-second boot calibration screen showing raw ADC mV so the user
   can compute the correct V_DIVIDER using a multimeter.

5. Replace voltage-inference USB heuristic with (bool)Serial — on XIAO
   ESP32-C6 Serial IS the USB CDC interface; returns true only when a
   USB host has enumerated the device. Honest about charger-only limitation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
